title: ferray-core: no in-place operators (AddAssign, SubAssign, etc.)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy supports arr += 5, arr *= other_arr — in-place operations that avoid allocation. ferray-core has no std::ops::AddAssign etc. impls. Users must do arr = (&arr + &other)?; which allocates a new buffer every time. For large arrays this is a significant performance gap. Implement AddAssign, SubAssign, MulAssign, DivAssign, RemAssign for Array<T,D> (both array-array and array-scalar). These should modify the data buffer in-place using zip_mut_with or mapv_inplace.
